profile.name: Ed Hoogasian
profile.primary_summary: Analytics and AI strategy leader with 8+ years building KPI systems, scalable reporting/data products, GTM/customer intelligence, market intelligence, executive reporting, and AI-enabled workflow automation. Strong at translating ambiguous business problems into reliable data foundations, dashboards, operating rhythms, and productized workflows that leaders and frontline teams adopt.
differentiators: Hybrid analytics + product/operator profile: can frame messy problems, build the solution, validate it, roll it out, and explain it to executives.

Proven business impact: $5.5M+ ARR impact from ICP/segmentation work, 2,000+ hours reclaimed through automation, 15%+ conversion improvement from qualification/outreach guidance, and 30-50% operational coordination reduction in supply chain planning contexts.
Company-name integrity: canonical experience keeps Mimecast, Rapid7, Latch, CyberArk, and CocoChew rather than anonymized source variants.
AI implementation credibility: prompt frameworks, LLM workflows, agentic patterns, contextual memory, eval/guardrails, structured extraction, document workflows, and client-facing portals.
profile.personal_notes: Proud girl dad; unprofessional golfer; professional dog lover; movie nerd; enjoys good beer and whiskey.

project_stories.title: Global MSP Transition Tracking System
project_stories.problem: Global partner-program revamp required reliable tracking of agreements, certification data, and transition progress across thousands of managed services partners.
project_stories.actions: Integrated DocuSign, Salesforce, DWH, and certification data; defined KPI framework and accuracy criteria; built Tableau dashboards and automated cadence reports.
project_stories.impact: Leadership could monitor adoption, risk, and completion for a high-stakes global transition.
project_stories.keywords: partner programs, MSP transition, Salesforce, DocuSign, DWH, Tableau, KPI framework

project_stories.title: ICP Redefinition and Retargeting Analytics
project_stories.problem: Targeting needed a stronger evidence-backed Ideal Customer Profile across multiple segments.
project_stories.actions: Combined CRM/ERP data, third-party firmographics, and qualitative signals from marketing, sales, product, and CS; defined segmentation and outreach guidance.
project_stories.impact: Retargeting and outreach campaigns produced $5.5M+ net-new ARR improvement.
project_stories.keywords: ICP, segmentation, firmographics, GTM strategy, ARR, executive recommendation

project_stories.title: Manual Workflow Automation and Pipeline Refactor
project_stories.problem: Manual workflows and an unreliable pipeline/bookings dataset consumed time and eroded trust.
project_stories.actions: Automated manual processes, optimized data pipelines, refactored business logic, and improved usability/reliability for downstream reporting.
project_stories.impact: Reclaimed 2,000+ off-clock hours and increased trust in core data assets.
project_stories.keywords: automation, pipeline optimization, data quality, bookings, workflow efficiency

project_stories.title: TAM / Whitespace / Territory Planning Dataset
project_stories.problem: Leadership needed a granular, data-driven way to size addressable market, plan territories/quotas, and identify whitespace.
project_stories.actions: Built syndicated dataset from top-level rollups to account/building granularity; connected market signals with operational planning needs.
project_stories.impact: Enabled strategic insight into market penetration/whitespace and supported territory/quota planning and partnerships.
project_stories.keywords: TAM, whitespace, territory planning, quota planning, market intelligence

project_stories.title: Secure Client Intake and Document Portal
project_stories.problem: Professional-services intake relied on manual scanning, printing, sorting, follow-ups, and opaque status tracking.
project_stories.actions: Built secure client intake/document portal with lifecycle management, encrypted transfer, structured tracking, and status visibility.
project_stories.impact: Eliminated scanning/printing/sorting overhead, saved hundreds of admin hours, improved data integrity and auditability.
project_stories.keywords: client portal, secure document transfer, workflow automation, lifecycle tracking, SaaS app

project_stories.title: Field Inspection Application and Customer Portal
project_stories.problem: Field technicians relied on paper-based inspection workflows, creating data quality and throughput constraints.
project_stories.actions: Mapped field workflows, designed mobile/low-code application, digitized data capture, and surfaced telemetry for tolerance regression, technician efficiency, and route optimization.
project_stories.impact: Reduced paperwork to near zero, improved data accuracy, and increased jobs completed per technician per day.
project_stories.keywords: field app, technician workflow, mobile app, telemetry, route optimization, customer portal

project_stories.title: AI-Orchestrated Insight Workflows
project_stories.problem: Recurring research, summarization, extraction, and reporting workflows required speed without losing quality.
project_stories.actions: Built LLM workflows using prompt libraries, routing logic, contextual memory/session layering, eval checks, guardrails, and human review.
project_stories.impact: Improved consistency, reduced manual effort, sped up analysis/documentation, and created repeatable automation patterns.
project_stories.keywords: LLM, prompt engineering, agentic workflows, evals, guardrails, contextual memory, RAG concepts

project_stories.title: Pricing & Packaging Profitability Analysis
project_stories.problem: Pricing/packaging overhaul condensed hundreds of legacy SKUs into bundles while launching a new cloud-integrated product platform.
project_stories.actions: Ran profitability analysis and partnered with operations/systems teams to ensure transition readiness, telemetry, and reporting.
project_stories.impact: Supported strategic pricing/packaging decision-making and future-proofed reporting for product transition.
project_stories.keywords: pricing, packaging, profitability, SKU rationalization, product analytics, telemetry

project_stories.title: Supply Chain Visibility and Planning Analytics
project_stories.problem: Procurement, manufacturing, and logistics signals were fragmented, limiting planning visibility and causing manual coordination overhead.
project_stories.actions: Built automated reporting dataset and KPI framework, analyzed bottlenecks/cost drivers, and recommended process improvements.
project_stories.impact: Improved planning visibility and reduced manual coordination by ~30-50% / 40-50% depending on resume wording.
project_stories.keywords: supply chain analytics, procurement, logistics, KPI framework, operational efficiency

project_stories.title: Lead-to-Revenue Funnel and Attribution Foundation
project_stories.problem: Campaign success and attribution needed a reliable lead-to-revenue data foundation.
project_stories.actions: Built source methodology and collaborated across leadership, marketing, operations, data engineering, and sales.
project_stories.impact: Improved GTM strategy and performance reporting for campaign attribution and funnel analysis.
project_stories.keywords: funnel, attribution, campaign analytics, RevOps, GTM data, data engineering

$5.5M+ net-new ARR from ICP and targeting analytics

website_content.content: Hundreds of administrative hours saved through secure intake/document workflows
Analytics Leadership: KPI frameworks, metric governance, executive dashboards, and operating rhythms.
AI Workflow Automation: prompt libraries, LLM guardrails, structured extraction, summarization, and human-in-the-loop QA.
GTM & Market Intelligence: TAM, ICP, funnel/attribution, segmentation, territory/quota planning, and partner performance.
Data Products: SQL/Snowflake/dbt-style foundations, dashboards, validation checks, documentation, and rollout.
Mimecast → CyberArk → Latch → Rapid7 → Mimecast WW Partner Programs → Independent AI & Analytics Consulting
website_content.usage_notes: Interactive career timeline, keep actual company names.

website_content.content: Global MSP Transition Analytics: data pipelines, partner-program KPIs, Tableau dashboards, and automated progress reporting for thousands of partners.
AI-Enabled Client Portal: secure intake, encrypted document transfer, lifecycle tracking, status visibility, and reporting foundation.
Field Inspection App: technician-first mobile workflow replacing paperwork with real-time capture and operational telemetry.
Proud girl dad, dog lover, movie nerd, unprofessional golfer, and curious builder.

application_engine_rules.rule: Do not remove or anonymize actual company names in the canonical experience section. Use Mimecast, Rapid7, Latch, CyberArk, and CocoChew unless a user explicitly asks for anonymized variants.
application_engine_rules.rationale: User specifically objected to company names being removed; one ATS source anonymized companies, so canonical database corrects this.

application_engine_rules.rule: Parse the job req into role family, seniority, domain, tools, required outcomes, and soft-skill signals. Select one primary positioning variant and 1-2 secondary variants.
application_engine_rules.rationale: Prevents overstuffing and keeps the resume coherent.

application_engine_rules.rule: Use exact keywords from the job req where truthful, but anchor them to evidence rows from Skills, Achievements, and Project_Stories. Never create unsupported claims or tools not present in the database.
Prioritize bullets with quantified outcomes first: $5.5M+ ARR, 2,000+ hours, 15%+ conversion, 30-50% coordination reduction, hundreds of admin hours, thousands of partners.
application_engine_rules.rationale: Metrics make candidacy attractive and defensible.

application_engine_rules.rule: For 1-page resumes, keep only the most relevant 2-3 bullets for current consulting, Mimecast WW Partner Programs, Rapid7, and optionally Latch/CyberArk compressed. For 2-page resumes, expand project detail and preserve older Mimecast bullets.
application_engine_rules.rationale: Prevents destructive trimming while allowing job-specific focus.

application_engine_rules.rule: Use strong but plain language: built, designed, developed, automated, integrated, standardized, defined, led, refactored, implemented, partnered, delivered. Avoid inflated claims and buzzword soup.

When AI is relevant, emphasize practical implementation: LLM workflows, prompt frameworks, structured extraction, evaluation checks, guardrails, human review, contextual memory, and automation outcomes.
application_engine_rules.rationale: Differentiates from shallow AI keyword stuffing.

application_engine_rules.rule: Website should be narrative and interactive: impact counters, capability cards, career timeline, project gallery, and keyword/skill graph. Use website_content plus project_stories as content API.
application_engine_rules.rationale: Turns resume database into portfolio-style interactive content.

application_engine_rules.rule: Application engine output should include: selected positioning variant, matched keywords, selected bullets, missing/weak evidence warnings, ATS summary, tailored resume sections, and cover-letter angle.
application_engine_rules.rationale: Makes the system auditable and iterative.

application_engine_rules.rule: Attach source_ids to generated bullets and profile claims so future edits can be traced to original resumes.
